content: Who did u guys pick from the ssr selection
each color pick 1
for each color can build at least a 2 + 2 team
Is there any screenshot for team comps people can use?
u can see the daily rank here and take other players' comps for reference. Click their characters and u can see more details.

Which of these are good ?
I haven't test all of them yet
Thanks.
Why i can't put her in same team as red character

the first one in row 2 and the backpack one is really good for your tank. and for those main carry who attack through 打击,  the 5th in row 1 and the 4th in row 2 are good. some blue ones are good too, such as 涌现, 活性, 眷顾
Thank you : )
u can also check the rank to see what other players choose, it  would be different depends on the team comp : )

It's sad i can't have the limited banner with my red awakened characters
I mean in same team
that's true the red characters can only team up with red and yellow characters
For some reason the card were it revive the entire team after death is gone from my inventory 🤔
whose card is it?🤨
I believe it was this one but after upgrade the skill effect has changed
it's effect is not to revive the team. its effect is just to give your character energy when you use 症状 card inthe fight.

Do you have the revive card ?
It's called death stranding in English
in PvE or PvP ?
i think the revive you said is 死亡抵抗。it's the probability that you survive from death
the card can make death character revive in PvP, looks like a cat and cost 3.

Not just pvp
I used it in pve
here is the mechanism that could make your team keep 1 HP
i used to called it Death Resistant
not a card
another mechanism that can save your team is a character's Special Ability, she's name is 「希莱斯特」, in blue faction.
when you team's HP going lower then 1, Death Resistant check, if pass, you get 2 more cost points, and draw 2 more card. if not, you lost this battle.

This game is what reverse 1999 should've been 
Reverse 1999 looks like the uncomplete version of this game with less skills, strategy and buff elements to make your team stronger
Real strategy games are not based on your levels against the enemy levels like all the turn based gatcha games doing 
This game gives u so much freedom with building your team with buffs that u can kill level 10 enemies with level 1 team
even a 20 Level gap
we achieve it
Do we know anything about global release
HI
My friend said morimens is a copy of reverse 1999
I was kind of pissed off lol cus
i love this game a lot 😥
I guess it will take a while, and the authorities haven't given us any definite information yet

Its the reason I came to try it myself.
Cuz people kept saying it was a clone of R1999 however, it is its own game. And a lot more. 
I'm surprised.




||But the game hard tho||
😂

I dont know much about that but so many people are saying this game was in beta way before reverse 1999
Reverse 1999 stole the idea
Just like Paladins and Overwatch

I've been stuck on one stage in chapter one. The boss with over 2k health. 
I think I'm doing so many things wrong I guess.
those who think its a clone of R1999 def never play the game
Need some help for winning 1-13 ?
I'm thinking which character works best with these two
these two should be apart, blue in blue, and red in red.
they could not be build in one team.
I know, i meant separate team
I suggest, consider what position it take first. Core, Aid, or what else.

Hey bro,
The cat revive effect isn't working 😫
I'm so confused does it only work with certain characters 
It was working fine before
tell me what the number is, when you start a new quest.
126% mean that, the first time your HP lower then 1 you can definitely  keep in 1, then the number reduce to 63%.
the second time you just have 63% to kepp in 1 HP, the third time 31%, etc.
the cat like equipment, contribute 25.2% Death Resistant for your team, when someone equip it.

When translating it says it goes to t4 + 100% if the awakened body is from chaos Realm
Is that the red element ?
your team is blue, cuz 「图鲁」
and you add yellow characters into your team, so u got that additional 100%
the word "chaos" refer to the yellow faction, in chinese 「混沌」.
the phases "awakened body" refer to your four characters that build your team
Thank u 🙂
Yes please. I most certainly need it.
These are what I have for now.
I think auto select is a bad thing.
I still have 2 selectors btw.
alright, you have 2 ways to solve the 1-13 final battle's mechanics
1. 朵尔, she's 3cost card 「等价交换」 can discard those stone card, and heal HP.
2.奥瑞塔, she's 2cost card 「同伴的力量」 can discard those stone card too.
You mean, Red cards that debuff me?
朵尔 is in yellow, 奥瑞塔 is in blue
石化
yep, let me find some pic for u
Yeeeeeeeah.... those debuffs are crazy.
the first time node maybe the 5th, it will give the original debuff into your hand, and change all the cards in hands into stone card.
This?
Or this?
another mechanism is increase the cost of some card, those card would stay in hands instead of discard, you'd better play them at beginning, or for a long time it growing too expensive.
the cost number would change into pink for those card.
Yeah Yeah I rememeber.
I rememeber leaving 1 cost and it turned 4 cost.
And I used to only for it to play out and the animation was a 1 cost Defense skill.
you could try 拉蒙娜、朵尔、萝坦 and 奥瑞塔
and i suggeust u get 1 more 萝坦
is ur account level over 15? after that u can equip 2 命轮
Nope.
alright, 1 is enough
Dont have enough to buy even 1.

聚首时刻 for 拉蒙娜
切割与伤害 for 萝坦
涌现 for 朵尔，overlay it, 3 star 涌现 can let you refresh the  store for free.
惩戒 for 奥瑞塔 maybe, left 50 gold before final battle could give you up to 250% additional Death Resistant.
when you have at least 10 腺体分裂 in deck, your 奥瑞塔's Special Ability reach it's maximum damage, release it after that time

wish u good luck, i'm going to help another for 3-12 and 3-13 now.
i will back.

Firstly Shields are breakable and secondly if you kill the character that's casting the sheild then its over 
  there are many turned based games were Shield cards aren't effected by turn and even in pvp
In this game you generate shield much more than healing
So if the shield doesn't disappear or doesn't have any downsides like other games, there will be almost no reason for healing
Just like how you see in the image, he generated 100 shield in one turn and his max hp is 120, he basically gained a second health bar if the shield doesn't disappear
The best use of shield is to have just enough to cover most or all the damage the enemy will do to you
I personally don't use healing characters in pve because it can't keep up with the damage received, while with shield I can block most or all of damage
Gives 35 madness to a chosen ally, basically enables ult spam way easier
I don't think you understand how much easier it is to accumulate shield vs dealing damage
Also "kill the shielder" there can be multiple on a team, which would absolutely be a meta strat with perma shields
